meaning: vt.保护,保持,保存,保藏vi.做蜜饯,禁猎n.蜜饯,果酱,禁猎地,禁区,防护物
examples: We need to preserve the forest.
We will do everything to preserve peace.
Efforts to preserve the peace have failed.
An environmentally-conscious educational complex called the Springs Preserve is a breath of fresh air.
Synergistic efforts to preserve wetlands take place within UNESCO Biosphere Reserves and Ramsar Wetlands.
